concurrency_probe.scope: Single Windows PHP built-in-server worker queue throughput; not a multi-worker singleflight claim.

fixture_coverage.proof: Fixture-specific JSON markers, fail-closed URL streams, and API/chapter/CDN loopback counters cover every measured upstream route family.

comparison.equality_scope: External harness/runtime conditions only. Source and runtime cache/prefetch policies are recorded intervention variables.

scope: Deterministic loopback successful-path comparison. It does not claim real-internet absolute latency or production multi-worker behavior.
